name: Goa
description: Golden beaches, electric nightlife, colonial Portuguese architecture, and world-class seafood. Goa is India's original party capital — but also hides serene spice farms, ancient temples, and lazy river cruises.

name: Rajasthan
description: The land of kings — opulent palaces, rose-pink cities, endless Thar desert dunes, and some of the finest cuisine in Asia. Jaipur, Udaipur, Jodhpur, and Jaisalmer each tell a different royal story.

name: Kerala
description: God's Own Country — glassy backwater lagoons, misty tea estates in Munnar, pristine Kovalam beaches, and Ayurvedic wellness retreats. Kerala is India's most photogenic state.

name: Himachal Pradesh
description: Where Himalayas touch the sky — trekking routes to 5000m+, the spiritual Spiti Valley, Manali's snow peaks, paragliding in Bir, and chilled apple orchards of Kinnaur.

name: Varanasi
description: The spiritual soul of India — ancient Ganga ghats that have witnessed 3000 years of civilization, the hypnotic Ganga Aarti, silk weaving lanes, and dawn boat rides on the holiest river.

name: Andaman Islands
description: India's hidden Maldives — crystal-clear turquoise lagoons, pristine Radhanagar Beach (Asia's #2 beach), world-class scuba diving, bioluminescent night kayaking, and UNESCO-listed coral reefs.
